stemHtml: On a non-pressurised aircraft, the use of an alternate static source fed from within the cabin results that the static pressure sensed is likely to be:

options.a: lower than ambient pressure due to aerodynamic suction.
options.b: higher than ambient pressure due to aerodynamic suction.
options.c: higher than ambient pressure due to position error.
options.d: lower than ambient pressure due to position error.
